name: krometrail
description: Krometrail skills — runtime debugging and browser recording for AI agents.

skills.name: krometrail-mcp
skills.description: Krometrail MCP tool reference. Load before invoking any mcp__krometrail__* tool. Covers debug_*, chrome_*, and session_* namespaces with per-language references for Python, Node.js, Go, and Chrome.

skills.name: krometrail-cli
skills.description: Krometrail CLI reference. Load when invoking the krometrail CLI binary. Covers all debug and browser subcommands, breakpoint syntax, output modes, and per-language setup.
